description_long: This is a large, modern residential house set within a walled property featuring a landscaped yard with several trees and a freeform swimming pool. The house itself is multi-storied with a complex, asymmetrical layout, including multiple rooflines and a prominent central glass atrium. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the property is enclosed by a high, solid fence with a double-gated entry. Large windows and glass doors are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The grounds include paved walkways, a poolside seating area, and a mix of open and shaded spaces, creating a luxurious suburban environment.
description: A spacious, modern multi-story house with a glass atrium, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and trees, all enclosed by a high fence and double gate.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, central glass atrium, and pool to the left, with trees lining the right side of the yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the back of the house, dense tree coverage along the fence, and the pool area in the far left corner.
description_view_2: Side view displays the double gate, central house structure, and the pool on the right, with trees along the left fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the house facade, pool in the foreground, and a glass-enclosed patio or sunroom to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and atrium windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with steps, overhang, and glass accents, flanked by landscaped elements and a wide driveway gate.
